title: tanacetum porphyrostephanum
intro: Tanacetum porphyrostephanum, also known as Purple-flowered Tansy, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, fever, and headaches. The health benefits of Tanacetum porphyrostephanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum porphyrostephanum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
